examples: The blue maguey is used to make both tequila and mescal.
Though it is made from the same plant as tequila (the magical maguey), pulque is not distilled.
Walls and ceiling are covered with psychedelic pre-Hispanic imagery: maguey plants, Aztec gods and goddesses, plumed serpents and skull racks.
But for El Maguey's bleary patrons, pancita promises more than a hearty kick.
